findings.title: Dashboard Load Time Optimization
findings.description: Optimize the dashboard load time to ensure it does not exceed 2 seconds for 95th percentile load times.
assumptions: The new charting library can be optimized for performance.

evidence.excerpt: Dashboard load time regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s after v3.2 deploy.

recommendations: Investigate SVG rendering optimizations in the new charting library.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is loaded WHEN the user accesses the dashboard THEN the load time should be <= 2 seconds for 95th percentile.

findings.title: API Latency Improvement
findings.description: Reduce API response times to ensure p95 latency does not exceed 200ms.
assumptions: Database query optimizations can be implemented.

evidence.excerpt: API response times degraded 3x after database migration.

recommendations: Analyze and optimize the query planner for time-series aggregation.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an API request is made WHEN the request is processed THEN the p95 latency should be <= 200ms.

findings.title: WebSocket Memory Leak Fix
findings.description: Resolve the memory leak issue in WebSocket connections to prevent server crashes.
assumptions: The memory leak can be identified and fixed in the WebSocket implementation.

evidence.excerpt: Memory leak in real-time WebSocket connections.

recommendations: Conduct heap profiling to identify and fix memory leaks.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a WebSocket connection is established WHEN the connection is active for 8 hours THEN memory usage should not exceed 2MB per hour.

findings.title: Automated Performance Regression Detection
findings.description: Implement automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline to catch regressions before deployment.
assumptions: A benchmark suite can be developed and integrated into the CI pipeline.

evidence.excerpt: Implement performance regression detection in CI pipeline.

recommendations: Develop a benchmark suite that runs on every PR.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a PR is submitted WHEN performance benchmarks are run THEN any regression exceeding 15% in p95 latency should block the merge.

findings.title: Customer Status Page Implementation
findings.description: Create a public status page to provide customers with real-time performance metrics and historical data.
assumptions: A status page can be developed and hosted.

evidence.excerpt: Customer-facing status page showing real-time performance metrics.

recommendations: Design and implement a public status page.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the status page is accessed WHEN it is live THEN it should display real-time p50/p95/p99 latencies, error rates, and uptime.

findings.title: Performance Monitoring and Alerting
findings.description: Set up monitoring and alerting for key performance metrics to proactively address issues.
assumptions: Monitoring tools can be integrated with existing systems.
recommendations: Integrate monitoring tools for real-time performance tracking.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics exceed defined thresholds THEN alerts should be triggered.
metadata.story_title: Set Up Performance Monitoring and Alerting

findings.title: User Feedback Collection Mechanism
findings.description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback on performance issues and overall satisfaction.
assumptions: Users will provide feedback if prompted.

evidence.excerpt: Lack of customer visibility during incidents.

recommendations: Create a feedback form accessible from the dashboard.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback form is accessible WHEN users submit feedback THEN it should be recorded and analyzed.

findings.title: Documentation for Performance Changes
findings.description: Create documentation outlining the changes made to improve performance and their impact.
assumptions: Documentation can be created and maintained.

evidence.excerpt: Dashboard load time regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s.

recommendations: Document performance changes and their rationale.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN performance changes are made WHEN documentation is created THEN it should accurately reflect the changes and their impact.

findings.title: User Training on New Features
findings.description: Provide training materials for users to understand new features and performance improvements.
assumptions: Users will benefit from training on new features.

evidence.excerpt: Build a public status page that shows real-time performance metrics.

recommendations: Develop training materials and sessions for users.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN training materials are created WHEN users access them THEN they should understand the new features and improvements.
metadata.story_title: Provide User Training on New Features

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Review
findings.description: Conduct a review of the dashboard and status page for accessibility compliance.
assumptions: Accessibility standards can be applied to the dashboard and status page.
recommendations: Perform an accessibility audit and implement necessary changes.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the accessibility review is conducted WHEN changes are made THEN the dashboard and status page should meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

findings.title: Performance Metrics Monitoring
findings.description: Implement monitoring for key performance metrics to track improvements over time.
assumptions: Monitoring tools can be integrated with existing systems.

evidence.excerpt: North Star metric for PageSpeed is the 95th percentile load time.

recommendations: Set up dashboards to visualize performance metrics.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are tracked THEN they should be visualized in a dashboard.

summary: The analysis identified critical performance regressions affecting dashboard load times and API latency, necessitating immediate optimization efforts. A structured backlog has been created with prioritized requirements, including performance improvements, automated detection, customer transparency, and user feedback mechanisms. Each requirement is detailed with acceptance criteria and dependencies to ensure effective implementation.
